name: Pendle PT/YT Yield Tokenization
description: Split a yield-bearing token (SY) into Principal Token (PT) and Yield Token (YT) on Pendle. Lets agents buy PT at discount for fixed-yield exposure, or sell YT to lock in current variable yield. 15-30% APY on stablecoins via PT discounts is routine.
use_case: Agent has 10k USDC. Buys PT-sUSDe (maturity 90 days) at $0.93 discount = $10,750 face value at maturity = 32% APY fixed. No impermanent loss, no liquidation risk.

verification.criteria: Post-tx the agent holds PT tokens of the specified market, and the implied yield-to-maturity is within ±0.5% of the oracle-reported value at block.timestamp.
